dealSummary: San Francisco-based Omni, an AI analytics startup, raised a $120 million Series C at a $1.5 billion valuation led by Iconiq Capital.
Tortugas Neuroscience, a biotech startup focused on neurology, raised $106 million in seed and Series A funding.

company: The seed round was led by Cure Ventures
dealSummary: The seed round was led by Cure Ventures, which also led the Series A alongside The Column Group, and AN Venture Partners. Cloudsmith, a UK-based artifact management specialist, raised a $72 million Series C led by TCV.
leadInvestors: Cure Ventures, which also led the Series A alongside The Column Group,, AN Venture Partners

dealSummary: Orkes, a workflow orchestration startup, raised a $60 million Series B led by AVP.
Paris-based space infrastructure developer Univity received a €27 million Series A from investors including Blast Club, Bpifrance and Expansion Ventures.
Decade Energy, a Paris-based startup building power infrastructure at logistics depots, raised €22 million in a round led by Eiffel Investment Group and SET Ventures.
Barcelona-based specialty coffee distributor Incapto secured a €10 million Series B led by McWin Capital Partners.
